name: registry_set_persistence_custom_protocol_handler
raw_query: any where (registry.path:"HKCR\\*" and winlog.event_data.Details:"URL:*") and (not (winlog.event_data.Details:"URL:ms-*" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)*", "C:\\Program Files\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*"))))
